emails.subject: Re: PG&E Core
emails.body: Hi Tana, Can we send a confirm under the Pacific Gas Electric Company for PG&E Core? The customer is calling for their confirms under the master. Thanks, Sheetal Forwarded by Sheetal Patel/HOU/ECT on 07/31/2000 01:54 PM From: Sara Shackleton on 07/25/2000 12:36 PM
